channel.title: Setup instructions on BlocksDS
channel.description: Recent content in Setup instructions on BlocksDS

item.title: Extra steps
item.description: 1. Test To test that everything is working, you can try building one of the templates. There is a template that lets the programmer write the code for both CPUs of the NDS (templates/rom_combined) and a template that uses the default ARM7 core that comes with Blocks DS and lets the programmer focus on the ARM9 core. There are also two templates to create static libraries. For example, go to the combined template folder and run:
